heading: Documents
intro: Upload PDFs or images into your profile, encrypted at rest. 10 MB maximum per file.
placeholder: This feature will be implemented in a later phase.

error.no-profile: No profile selected. Create a profile first.
error.unsupported-type: File type "{{mimeType}}" is not supported. Accepted: PDF, PNG, JPEG, WebP.
error.file-too-large: File too large ({{sizeMb}} MB). Maximum: {{limitMb}} MB.

error.not-found: Document not found. It may have been deleted.
error.decrypt-failed: Could not decrypt document. Unlock the app and try again.
error.unsupported-type: Preview for file type "{{mimeType}}" is not supported yet.

delete.confirm: Delete "{{filename}}" permanently? This cannot be undone.
delete.linked-warning: This document is linked to a {{kind}}. The {{kind}} itself will remain.
delete.derived-entries-warning_one: This document is the source of {{count}} imported entry. After deletion the entry remains but loses its source link.
delete.derived-entries-warning_other: This document is the source of {{count}} imported entries. After deletion the entries remain but lose their source link.
delete.derived-cleanup-failed: Delete failed: source references could not be cleared. Please try again.

error.no-profile: No profile selected. Create a profile first.
error.generic: Could not load documents. Please try again.

quota.heading: Storage usage
quota.warning-medium: Storage is filling up. Review older documents soon.
quota.warning-high: Storage almost full. Delete older documents to free space.

persistence.denied: Browser did not grant persistent storage. Data may be evicted under storage pressure. Tip: add the app to your home screen.
